title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Vijay Sales - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
